title: DOE announces ‘historic’ record-breaking loan package to Southern Company for new generation, grid upgrades
description: U.S. Secretary of Energy Chris Wright announced a $26.5 billion loan package from the DOE to Southern Company, aimed at reducing electricity costs for millions in Georgia and Alabama.
content: U.S. Secretary of Energy Chris Wright announced a $26.5 billion loan package from the DOE to Southern Company, aimed at reducing electricity costs for millions in Georgia and Alabama.
